items.title: If Artists Mapped the World
items.summary: Three shows unravel the politics of cartography. Also, why does a new Messi statue look like … that?

items.title: At Upstate Art Weekend, Cars and Barns Are Galleries
items.summary: During the seventh annual event, hundreds of artists proved that art has never been confined to “white cube” galleries.

items.title: See Photos From a Sweltering, Joyous NYC Pride March
items.summary: I joined more than 75,000 marchers and one million spectators on Sunday, June 28, to document the parade on Stonewall's 57th anniversary.

items.title: Texas Tattoo Artist Gets 30-Year Sentence Over “Anti-Trump” Zines
items.summary: Daniel “Des” Sanchez Estrada faces three decades in prison after he moved a box of left-wing literature in the aftermath of an anti-ICE protest.
